import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react' import { environmentLogService, seasonService } from '../../services/api' import '../../styles/technician/technician-layout.css' import '../../styles/technician/technician-environment.css' const emptyForm = { seasonId: '', ph: '', temperature: '', oxygen: '', salinity: '', waterLevel: '', note: 'Nước trong, tôm ăn khỏe', } const formatDateTime = (value) => { if (!value) return '-' const date = new Date(value) if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return '-' return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('vi-VN', { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit', year: 'numeric', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', timeZone: 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh', }).format(date) } const formatNumber = (value) => { if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') return '-' const number = Number(value) if (Number.isNaN(number)) return value return number.toString() } const formatTimeOnly = (value) => { if (!value) return '--:--' const date = new Date(value) if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return '--:--' return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('vi-VN', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', timeZone: 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh', }).format(date) } const toNumber = (value) => { const parsed = Number(value) return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null } const clamp = (value, min, max) => Math.min(max, Math.max(min, value)) const isAbnormalLog = (item) => { const ph = toNumber(item.ph) const temperature = toNumber(item.temperature) const oxygen = toNumber(item.oxygen) const salinity = toNumber(item.salinity) const waterLevel = toNumber(item.water_level) return ( (ph !== null && (ph < 7.5 || ph > 8.5)) || (temperature !== null && (temperature < 26 || temperature > 30)) || (oxygen !== null && oxygen < 5) || (salinity !== null && (salinity < 10 || salinity > 20)) || (waterLevel !== null && (waterLevel < 80 || waterLevel > 140)) ) } const TechnicianEnvironment = () => { const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true) const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false) const [error, setError] = useState('') const [success, setSuccess] = useState('') const [seasons, setSeasons] = useState([]) const [environmentLogs, setEnvironmentLogs] = useState([]) const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('') const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('ALL') const [form, setForm] = useState(emptyForm) const [selectedLogId, setSelectedLogId] = useState(null) useEffect(() => { const loadData = async () => { try { setLoading(true) const seasonsRes = await seasonService.getAllSeasons() const seasonData = seasonsRes?.data?.data || [] setSeasons(seasonData) if (seasonData.length > 0) { setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, seasonId: String(seasonData[0].season_id) })) } setError('') } catch (loadError) { setError(loadError?.response?.data?.message || 'Không tải được dữ liệu mùa vụ') } finally { setLoading(false) } } loadData() }, []) useEffect(() => { const loadLogs = async () => { if (!form.seasonId) { setEnvironmentLogs([]) setSelectedLogId(null) return } try { const res = await environmentLogService.getBySeasonId(form.seasonId) const logData = res?.data?.data || [] setEnvironmentLogs(logData) setSelectedLogId(logData[0]?.log_id || null) } catch (loadError) { setEnvironmentLogs([]) setSelectedLogId(null) setError(loadError?.response?.data?.message || 'Không tải được dữ liệu môi trường') } } loadLogs() }, [form.seasonId]) const seasonOptions = useMemo( () => seasons.map((season) => ({ id: season.season_id, label: `${season.season_name || `Mùa vụ ${season.season_id}`} - Ao ${season.pond_id}` })), [seasons] ) const selectedSeason = useMemo( () => seasons.find((season) => String(season.season_id) === String(form.seasonId)) || null, [seasons, form.seasonId] ) const selectedLog = useMemo( () => environmentLogs.find((item) => String(item.log_id) === String(selectedLogId)) || environmentLogs[0] || null, [environmentLogs, selectedLogId] ) const filteredLogs = useMemo(() => { const normalizedSearch = searchTerm.trim().toLowerCase() return environmentLogs.filter((item) => { const haystack = [formatDateTime(item.recorded_at), item.log_id, item.ph, item.temperature, item.oxygen, item.salinity, item.water_level] .map((value) => String(value || '').toLowerCase()) .join(' ') const matchesSearch = !normalizedSearch || haystack.includes(normalizedSearch) const abnormal = isAbnormalLog(item) const matchesStatus = statusFilter === 'ALL' || (statusFilter === 'NORMAL' && !abnormal) || (statusFilter === 'ABNORMAL' && abnormal) return matchesSearch && matchesStatus }) }, [environmentLogs, searchTerm, statusFilter]) const summary = useMemo(() => { const pondCount = new Set(seasons.map((season) => season.pond_id)).size const abnormalLogs = environmentLogs.filter(isAbnormalLog).length return { pondCount, totalLogs: environmentLogs.length, abnormalLogs, latestEntry: environmentLogs[0] || null, } }, [environmentLogs, seasons]) const chartPoints = useMemo(() => { const samples = environmentLogs.slice(0, 8).reverse() if (samples.length === 0) return [] return samples.map((item, index) => ({ x: samples.length === 1 ? 50 : (index / (samples.length - 1)) * 100, yTemp: 100 - clamp(((toNumber(item.temperature) ?? 28) - 24) / 10 * 100, 0, 100), yPh: 100 - clamp(((toNumber(item.ph) ?? 7.5) - 6.5) / 3.5 * 100, 0, 100), yOxygen: 100 - clamp(((toNumber(item.oxygen) ?? 6) - 3) / 7 * 100, 0, 100), })) }, [environmentLogs]) const chartPath = (key) => { if (chartPoints.length === 0) return '' return chartPoints.map((point, index) => `${index === 0 ? 'M' : 'L'} ${point.x.toFixed(2)} ${point[key].toFixed(2)}`).join(' ') } const handleChange = (field, value) => { setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, [field]: value })) } const handleReset = () => { setForm((prev) => ({ ...emptyForm, seasonId: prev.seasonId })) setSuccess('') setError('') } const handleSubmit = async (event) => { event.preventDefault() try { setSaving(true) setError('') setSuccess('') await environmentLogService.createLog({ seasonId: Number(form.seasonId), ph: Number(form.ph), temperature: Number(form.temperature), oxygen: Number(form.oxygen), salinity: Number(form.salinity), waterLevel: Number(form.waterLevel), note: form.note, }) setSuccess('Đã lưu dữ liệu môi trường thành công') setForm((prev) => ({ ...emptyForm, seasonId: prev.seasonId })) const res = await environmentLogService.getBySeasonId(form.seasonId) const logData = res?.data?.data || [] setEnvironmentLogs(logData) setSelectedLogId(logData[0]?.log_id || null) } catch (submitError) { setError(submitError?.response?.data?.message || 'Không thể lưu dữ liệu môi trường') } finally { setSaving(false) } } return (

Nhập chỉ số môi trường

Nhập dữ liệu đo thủ công cho mùa vụ thuộc ao bạn phụ trách

{selectedSeason &&
{selectedSeason.season_name || `Mùa vụ ${selectedSeason.season_id}`}
}
◉

Ao nuôi phụ trách

{summary.pondCount} Ao

Hoạt động
✎

Số lần nhập hôm nay

{summary.totalLogs} Lần

vừa xong
⚠

Chỉ số bất thường

{summary.abnormalLogs} Lần

Cảnh báo
🕒

Lần nhập gần nhất

{summary.latestEntry ? formatTimeOnly(summary.latestEntry.recorded_at) : '--:--'}

vừa xong
{error &&
{error}
} {success &&
{success}
}

Biểu mẫu nhập liệu

Nhập nhanh các chỉ số theo mùa vụ đang phụ trách

26-30°C
handleChange('temperature', e.target.value)} required /> °C
7.5-8.5
handleChange('ph', e.target.value)} required /> pH
NTU
handleChange('oxygen', e.target.value)} required /> NTU
10-20 ppt
handleChange('salinity', e.target.value)} required /> ppt
cm
handleChange('waterLevel', e.target.value)} required /> cm
